# Potato Daily

> Free random picker for Scrum daily standups. Helps agile teams and Scrum Masters fairly select who speaks next during daily standup meetings, sprint planning, and retrospectives.

Potato Daily is a single-page web application built with Svelte 5 and Vite 6. Users add team members (with auto-generated avatars), start a round, watch a short countdown, and the app randomly picks one person to speak. Picked people are removed from the pool until everyone has had a turn. State is persisted in `localStorage` — no account, no server, no tracking beyond Google Analytics.

## Key facts

- **Purpose**: Random selection tool for Scrum daily standup meetings.
- **Audience**: Scrum Masters, agile coaches, engineering team leads, distributed teams running stand-ups.
- **Cost**: Free, no signup, no paywall.
- **Languages**: English, Spanish, French (auto-detected from browser).
- **Privacy**: Team data stored locally in the browser only. Avatars generated via DiceBear API.
- **Platform**: Web (any modern browser, mobile and desktop).

## How to use

1. Open https://potatodaily.com/
2. Add each team member by name — an avatar is generated automatically.
3. Click start. Countdown begins.
4. App picks one random person from the remaining pool.
5. That person speaks. Repeat until pool is empty.
6. Reset to play another round.

## Pages

- [Home / App](https://potatodaily.com/): The full application — add team, run rounds, pick speakers.
